title: cosmiza multifida
intro: Cosmiza multifida, also known as the multifida plant, is a type of tropical plant that belongs to the family of Rutaceae, which includes citrus fruits. The multifida plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cosmiza multifida include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be made into a tincture or oil for easier consumption.
